stemHtml: A pilot experiences a significant decline in visual acuity and chronic headaches. What is the consequence?

options.a: The pilot may not exercise the privileges of the licence.
options.b: The pilot may not fly as PIC commercially but may in non-commercial operations.
options.c: The pilot may no longer be PIC but can still use other licence privileges.
options.d: The pilot may not fly as PIC in either commercial or non-commercial transport.
